flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Pomona College fell 30% between 2021 and 2024 (86.5% → 60.9%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Pomona College rose 23% between 2007 and 2010 ($6.1k → $7.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Pomona College rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($56.7k → $65.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Pomona College rose 13% between 2007 and 2010 ($33.9k → $38.4k).
